# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Custom build script or commands to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_script:
        description: 'Custom deployment commands to execute'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for script execution'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '.'
      environment:
        description: 'Target deployment environment'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
        default: 'development'
      timeout_minutes:
        description: 'Job timeout in minutes'
        required: false
        type: number
        default: 60
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  PIPELINE_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}-${{ github.run_number }}

jobs:
  validate:
    name: Validate Inputs
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter]
    outputs:
      should_deploy: ${{ steps.check.outputs.should_deploy }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Validate inputs and environment
        id: check
        run: |
          echo "=== Pipeline Validation ==="
          echo "Pipeline ID: ${{ env.PIPELINE_ID }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
          echo "Ref: ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"

          if [ -n "${{ inputs.deploy_script }}" ]; then
            echo "should_deploy=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "should_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

          echo "Runner hostname: $(hostname)"
          echo "Runner OS: $(uname -a)"
          echo "Available disk space:"
          df -h . || true
          echo "Available memory:"
          free -h 2>/dev/null || vm_stat 2>/dev/null || true

  build:
    name: Custom Build
    needs: validate
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout_minutes || '60') }}
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup build workspace
        run: |
          echo "=== Setting up build workspace ==="
          echo "Working directory: $(pwd)"
          echo "Build started at: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

          mkdir -p build-output
          mkdir -p build-logs
          mkdir -p artifacts

      - name: Execute custom build script
        id: build
        env:
          BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ inputs.environment || 'development' }}
          GITHUB_ACTOR: ${{ github.actor }}
          BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          COMMIT_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Executing Custom Build Script ==="
          echo "Environment: ${BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
          echo "Branch: ${BRANCH_NAME}"
          echo "Commit: ${COMMIT_SHA}"
          echo ""

          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ inputs.build_script }}"

          if [ -z "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
            echo "No custom build script provided via workflow_dispatch."
            echo "Looking for default build scripts..."

            if [ -f "./build.sh" ]; then
              echo "Found build.sh, executing..."
              chmod +x ./build.sh
              ./build.sh 2>&1 | tee build-logs/build.log
            elif [ -f "./Makefile" ]; then
              echo "Found Makefile, running make..."
              make all 2>&1 | tee build-logs/build.log
            elif [ -f "./package.json" ]; then
              echo "Found package.json, running npm build..."
              npm ci 2>&1 | tee build-logs/install.log
              npm run build 2>&1 | tee build-logs/build.log
            elif [ -f "./pom.xml" ]; then
              echo "Found pom.xml, running Maven build..."
              mvn clean package -B 2>&1 | tee build-logs/build.log
            elif [ -f "./build.gradle" ] || [ -f "./build.gradle.kts" ]; then
              echo "Found Gradle build file, running Gradle build..."
              ./gradlew build 2>&1 | tee build-logs/build.log
            else
              echo "No recognized build system found and no custom script provided."
              echo "Please provide a build script via workflow_dispatch."
              exit 1
            fi
          else
            echo "Executing provided build script..."
            echo "---"
            echo "${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
            echo "---"
            bash -e -o pipefail -c "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" 2>&1 | tee build-logs/build.log
          fi

          echo "build_status=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Build completed successfully at: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

      - name: Collect build artifacts
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "=== Collecting Build Artifacts ==="

          if [ -d "build-output" ] && [ "$(ls -A build-output 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
            echo "Found files in build-output/"
            ls -la build-output/
          fi

          if [ -d "dist" ] && [ "$(ls -A dist 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
            echo "Found files in dist/"
            cp -r dist/* artifacts/ 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

          if [ -d "build" ] && [ "$(ls -A build 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
            echo "Found files in build/"
            cp -r build/* artifacts/ 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

          if [ -d "target" ] && [ "$(ls -A target 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
            echo "Found files in target/"
            find target -name "*.jar" -o -name "*.war" -o -name "*.zip" | head -20 | while read f; do
              cp "$f" artifacts/ 2>/dev/null || true
            done
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ env.PIPELINE_ID }}
          path: |
            ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}/artifacts/
            ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}/build-output/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Upload build logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-logs-${{ env.PIPELINE_ID }}
          path: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}/build-logs/
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    needs: build
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout_minutes || '60') }}
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ env.PIPELINE_ID }}
          path: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}/artifacts/
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Execute tests
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Tests ==="
          mkdir -p test-results

          if [ -f "./test.sh" ]; then
            echo "Found test.sh, executing..."
            chmod +x ./test.sh
            ./test.sh 2>&1 | tee test-results/test.log
          elif [ -f "./Makefile" ] && grep -q "^test:" Makefile; then
            echo "Found test target in Makefile..."
            make test 2>&1 | tee test-results/test.log
          elif [ -f "./package.json" ]; then
            echo "Found package.json, running npm test..."
            npm ci 2>/dev/null || true
            npm test 2>&1 | tee test-results/test.log || true
          elif [ -f "./pom.xml" ]; then
            echo "Running Maven tests..."
            mvn test -B 2>&1 | tee test-results/test.log
          elif [ -f "./build.gradle" ] || [ -f "./build.gradle.kts" ]; then
            echo "Running Gradle tests..."
            ./gradlew test 2>&1 | tee test-results/test.log
          else
            echo "No recognized test framework found. Skipping tests."
          fi

          echo "Tests completed at: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

      - name: Upload test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results-${{ env.PIPELINE_ID }}
          path: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}/test-results/
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  deploy:
    name: Custom Deployment
    needs: [build, test, validate]
    if: |
      needs.validate.outputs.should_deploy == 'true' ||
      (github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main')
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout_minutes || '60') }}
    environment:
      name: ${{ inputs.environment || 'development' }}
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ env.PIPELINE_ID }}
          path: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}/artifacts/
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Pre-deployment checks
        run: |
          echo "=== Pre-Deployment Checks ==="
          echo "Target environment: ${{ inputs.environment || 'development' }}"
          echo "Deploying commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Deploying branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "Initiated by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo ""

          if [ "${{ inputs.environment }}" = "production" ]; then
            echo "⚠️  PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT"
            echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
            if [ "${{ github.ref_name }}" != "main" ]; then
              echo "WARNING: Deploying non-main branch to production!"
            fi
          fi

          mkdir -p deploy-logs

      - name: Execute custom deployment script
        id: deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ inputs.environment || 'development' }}
          GITHUB_ACTOR: ${{ github.actor }}
          BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          COMMIT_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Executing Custom Deployment ==="

          DEPLOY_SCRIPT="${{ inputs.deploy_script }}"

          if [ -z "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" ]; then
            echo "No custom deploy script provided via workflow_dispatch."
            echo "Looking for default deploy scripts..."

            if [ -f "./deploy.sh" ]; then
              echo "Found deploy.sh, executing..."
              chmod +x ./deploy.sh
              ./deploy.sh "${DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}" 2>&1 | tee deploy-logs/deploy.log
            elif [ -f "./Makefile" ] && grep -q "^deploy:" Makefile; then
              echo "Found deploy target in Makefile..."
              make deploy ENVIRONMENT="${DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}" 2>&1 | tee deploy-logs/deploy.log
            else
              echo "No deployment script found and no custom script provided."
              echo "Skipping deployment step."
            fi
          else
            echo "Executing provided deployment script..."
            echo "---"
            echo "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
            echo "---"
            bash -e -o pipefail -c "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" 2>&1 | tee deploy-logs/deploy.log
          fi

          echo "deploy_status=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Deployment completed at: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

      - name: Post-deployment verification
        if: steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_status == 'success'
        run: |
          echo "=== Post-Deployment Verification ==="

          if [ -f "./verify-deployment.sh" ]; then
            echo "Running deployment verification script..."
            chmod +x ./verify-deployment.sh
            ./verify-deployment.sh "${{ inputs.environment || 'development' }}" 2>&1 | tee deploy-logs/verify.log
          else
            echo "No verification script found. Deployment assumed successful."
          fi

      - name: Upload deployment logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deploy-logs-${{ env.PIPELINE_ID }}
          path: ${{ inputs.working_directory || '.' }}/deploy-logs/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup Workspace
    needs: [build, test, deploy]
    if: always()
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter]
    steps:
      - name: Clean up workspace
        run: |
          echo "=== Cleaning up workspace ==="
          echo "Pipeline ID: ${{ env.PIPELINE_ID }}"
          echo "Cleanup started at: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

          if [ -d "${{ github.workspace }}" ]; then
            echo "Cleaning workspace directory..."
            rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/artifacts" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/build-output" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/build-logs" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/deploy-logs" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf "${{ github.workspace }}/test-results" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

          docker system prune -f 2>/dev/null || true

          echo "Cleanup completed at: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

  notify:
    name: Send Notifications
    needs: [validate, build, test, deploy, cleanup]
    if: always()
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter]
    steps:
      - name: Pipeline summary
        run: |
          echo "=== Pipeline Summary ==="
          echo "Pipeline ID: ${{ env.PIPELINE_ID }}"
          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
          echo "Environment: ${{ inputs.environment || 'development' }}"
          echo ""
          echo "Job Results:"
          echo "  Validate: ${{ needs.validate.result }}"
          echo "  Build:    ${{ needs.build.result }}"
          echo "  Test:     ${{ needs.test.result }}"
          echo "  Deploy:   ${{ needs.deploy.result }}"
          echo "  Cleanup:  ${{ needs.cleanup.result }}"
          echo ""

          if [ "${{ needs.build.result }}" = "failure" ] || [ "${{ needs.deploy.result }}" = "failure" ]; then
            echo "❌ Pipeline completed with failures"
            exit 0
          elif [ "${{ needs.build.result }}" = "success" ]; then
            echo "✅ Pipeline completed successfully"
          else
            echo "⚠️  Pipeline completed with warnings"
          fi
